title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cisco India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cisco India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cisco India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cisco India:
Cisco India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India!
